text:
TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is derived by accumulating the beneficiary's part a coinsurance liability amount that is 
present on any of the claim records included in the stay (i.e., the sum of coinsurance amounts 
reported on the claims that comprise the stay).
